title: PSG's Hakimi to face trial on rape charges
description: Paris ⁠Saint-Germain ⁠defender Achraf Hakimi ⁠said that he will stand trial following a rape accusation made against him. The accusation stems from a February 2023 incident in which a then 24-year-old woman accused the Moroccan player of sexually assaulting her at his home outside of Paris. Hakimi has repeatedly denied any wrongdoing.

title: Germany's Merz to push for 'fair' economic competition on first visit to China
description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz touched down in China on Wednesday, beginning his inaugural visit to his country's largest trade partner and a high-tech rival as Europe's biggest economy struggles Merz said he would use the trip to push for “fair” economic competition with China.

title: Iran warns students over 'red lines' as protests continue
description: University students in Iran kicked off a new semester over the weekend with gatherings in which they revived slogans from nationwide protests against the country's clerical leadership that were met by a deadly crackdown. The demonstrations triggered a muted warning from the government  which sad although the students had a right to protest, they must "understand the red lines".

title: Live: Ukrainian negotiator to meet US team ahead of fresh Russia talks, Zelensky says
description: ⁠Ukraine's lead negotiator Rustem Umerov will meet with US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner on Thursday, President Volodymyr Zelensky said on Wednesday, ahead of a fresh round of trilateral talks with Russia expected in March. Follow our liveblog for the latest developments.

title: Gazans battle to salvage ancient books in war-ravaged mosque library
description: Working amid the dust and rubble, a group of Gazan volunteers are battling to save what remains of the collection of ancient books inside the library of the Omari Mosque. The mosque holds one of the oldest libraries in the Palestinian territories but it sustained terrible damaged during the war in Gaza, which erupted in October 2023 and devastated swathes of the Palestinian territory, including cultural and religious sites.

title: Trump’s 2026 State of Union address shows US politics ‘as divided as ever’

title: Trump threatens Iran in State of the Union speech, Tehran compares him to Goebbels

title: Trump sets new record for SOTU speech length
description: President Trump's State of the Union speech set a new record Tuesday for the longest address to Congress, at 108 minutes — eight longer than his 100 minute speech in 2025.
